title: Admin login redirects to admin dashboard
description: Verifies that a user can log in successfully and is redirected to the admin dashboard with an authenticated session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the admin dashboard

title: Admin role routing after login reaches the admin dashboard
description: An admin can log in and is routed to the admin dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the admin dashboard

title: Approve a pending user registration
description: Approving a pending registration moves the user from pending to active users.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open user management
Click Approve on a pending user
Verify the user is no longer shown in pending registrations and appears in the active users list

title: Submit access request from restricted/confidential material flow
description: A public researcher can submit an access request from a restricted/confidential material and see a submission confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /collections
Set the access level filter to restricted or confidential
Open a material's detail view from the filtered results
Choose to request access for the material
Fill in the reason for access with a clear research purpose
Fill in the contact details with valid values
Submit the access request
Verify a submission confirmation is visible

title: Start an access request from a restricted/confidential material detail
description: A public researcher who opens a restricted or confidential material is funneled to the access request flow from the material detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /collections
Set the access level filter to restricted or confidential
Open a material's detail view from the filtered results
Choose to request access for the material
Verify the request access form page is displayed

title: Browse collections using search, OAIS-only, filters, view toggle, open item, then clear filters
description: Verifies that a public user can find materials using search and filters, open a material from results, and reset back to the full listing by clearing filters.

steps.description: Navigate to /collections
Fill a search query into the search field
Toggle OAIS-only filtering on
Open the filters panel
Select an access level filter option
Toggle between grid and list view
Click a material from the results to open its detail view
Verify the material detail view is displayed

title: Approve a pending access request
description: Approving a pending access request updates its status to approved in the requests list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open access requests management
Click Approve on a pending access request
Confirm the approval
Verify the request is marked as approved in the list

title: Use the material viewer and metadata tabs and export metadata CSV
description: A public researcher can open a material, use viewer controls, switch metadata tabs, and download a metadata CSV successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /collections
Open a material's detail view from the collections results
Navigate to a different page using the page thumbnails
Zoom in on the document
Rotate the document
Switch to the Dublin Core metadata tab
Download the material metadata as CSV
Verify a metadata CSV download is initiated

title: Ingest a new public material and see it listed in admin materials
description: This test verifies an admin can complete the ingestion workflow end-to-end and the new material appears in the admin materials list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the admin materials management area
Initiate a new material ingest
Select a department/subfonds from the hierarchy selector
Select a series from the series selector
Fill Ingest Public Material 001 into the material title field
Fill Creator A into the creator field
Select Public as the access level
Fill a valid terms of use text into the terms field
Finalize the ingest workflow
Verify the newly ingested material is visible in the admin materials list

title: Directly submit an access request from the request access page
description: A researcher can complete the request access form from the dedicated page and receives a visible submission confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /request-access
Select or describe a material to request access for
Fill in the reason for access with a clear research purpose
Fill in the affiliation details with a valid value
Fill in the contact details with valid values
Submit the access request
Verify a submission confirmation is visible

title: Reject a pending access request
description: Rejecting a pending access request updates its status to rejected in the requests list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open access requests management
Click Reject on a pending access request
Confirm the rejection
Verify the request is marked as rejected in the list

title: Export a batch metadata CSV from the filtered admin materials list
description: This test verifies an admin can filter the materials list and export a batch metadata CSV for the visible results.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the admin materials management area
Fill Export Batch Seed 001 into the search field
Initiate a new material ingest
Select a department/subfonds from the hierarchy selector
Select a series from the series selector
Fill Export Batch Seed 001 into the material title field
Fill Creator Export into the creator field
Select Public as the access level
Fill a valid terms of use text into the terms field
Finalize the ingest workflow
Fill Export Batch Seed 001 into the search field
Click the batch export metadata control
Verify a CSV download is initiated for the visible filtered materials

title: Create and publish an announcement
description: Verifies an admin can create an announcement, publish it, and see it appear in the announcements list as an active item.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to announcement management
Start creating a new announcement
Fill Test Announcement Alpha into the announcement title field
Fill Announcement content for automated test into the announcement content field
Set the announcement to active/published
Save the announcement
Verify the announcements list contains Test Announcement Alpha and indicates it is active

title: View a material in fullscreen and navigate pages
description: A public researcher can open fullscreen mode for a material and navigate between pages before returning to the detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /collections
Open a material's detail view from the collections results
Open the document in fullscreen
Navigate to the next page using the fullscreen arrow controls
Navigate to the previous page using the fullscreen arrow controls
Exit fullscreen mode
Verify the standard material detail viewer is displayed

title: Edit a material in admin and see updated metadata persisted in the list/details
description: This test verifies an admin can edit a material’s metadata and the updated values persist in the UI after saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the admin materials management area
Initiate a new material ingest
Select a department/subfonds from the hierarchy selector
Select a series from the series selector
Fill Admin Edit Seed 001 into the material title field
Fill Creator BeforeEdit into the creator field
Select Public as the access level
Fill a valid terms of use text into the terms field
Finalize the ingest workflow
Fill Admin Edit Seed 001 into the search field
Expand the material row to open its details
Open the edit material workflow for the expanded item
Fill Creator AfterEdit into the creator field
Save the material edits
Verify the updated creator value Creator AfterEdit is displayed for the material

title: Reject a pending user registration
description: Rejecting a pending registration marks the registration as rejected and it no longer appears as pending.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open user management
Click Reject on a pending user
Verify the pending registration is marked rejected or removed from the pending list

title: Search admin materials by title/creator/ID and see matching results
description: This test verifies searching in admin materials filters the list to matching items based on entered text.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the admin materials management area
Initiate a new material ingest
Select a department/subfonds from the hierarchy selector
Select a series from the series selector
Fill Admin Search Seed 001 into the material title field
Fill Creator SearchSeed into the creator field
Select Public as the access level
Fill a valid terms of use text into the terms field
Finalize the ingest workflow
Fill Admin Search Seed 001 into the search field
Verify the materials list shows the seeded material among the results

title: Switch across Details, Dublin Core, and Related Items tabs
description: A public researcher can switch between all metadata tabs and see the corresponding content for each tab.

steps.description: Navigate to /collections
Open a material's detail view from the collections results
Switch to the Details metadata tab
Switch to the Dublin Core metadata tab
Switch to the Related Items tab
Verify related items content is displayed

title: Export a single material metadata CSV from its admin row details
description: This test verifies an admin can download a single-item metadata CSV from an individual material in the admin materials view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the admin materials management area
Initiate a new material ingest
Select a department/subfonds from the hierarchy selector
Select a series from the series selector
Fill Export Single Seed 001 into the material title field
Fill Creator Export Single into the creator field
Select Public as the access level
Fill a valid terms of use text into the terms field
Finalize the ingest workflow
Fill Export Single Seed 001 into the search field
Expand the material row to open its details
Click the download metadata control for the material
Verify a CSV download is initiated for the selected material

title: Registering a new account results in pending approval confirmation
description: Verifies that a new user can submit registration details and sees a pending-approval confirmation state.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Test Researcher into the name field
Fill test.researcher.unique@example.com into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Select an institution
Select a role or user category
Submit the registration form
Verify a confirmation is visible indicating the registration is pending approval

title: Delete a material from admin and confirm it is removed from results
description: This test verifies an admin can delete a material and it no longer appears in the admin materials list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the admin materials management area
Initiate a new material ingest
Select a department/subfonds from the hierarchy selector
Select a series from the series selector
Fill Admin Delete Seed 001 into the material title field
Fill Creator DeleteSeed into the creator field
Select Public as the access level
Fill a valid terms of use text into the terms field
Finalize the ingest workflow
Fill Admin Delete Seed 001 into the search field
Expand the material row to open its details
Delete the material
Fill Admin Delete Seed 001 into the search field
Verify the materials list shows no results for the deleted material

title: Delete an existing announcement
description: Verifies an admin can delete an announcement and it is removed from the announcements list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to announcement management
Start creating a new announcement
Fill Test Announcement Delete Gamma into the announcement title field
Fill Delete flow test content into the announcement content field
Save the announcement
Delete the announcement for Test Announcement Delete Gamma
Verify Test Announcement Delete Gamma is not present in the announcements list

title: View and filter compliance table then expand a material row for details
description: An admin can filter the materials compliance table and expand a material row to see detailed compliance information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Select a non-default compliance filter tab
Expand a material row in the materials table
Verify detailed material compliance information is displayed

title: Ingestion access controls allow selecting Restricted and entering terms
description: This test verifies an admin can set a material to Restricted, provide terms of use, and finalize ingest successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the admin materials management area
Initiate a new material ingest
Select a department/subfonds from the hierarchy selector
Select a series from the series selector
Fill Ingest Restricted Material 001 into the material title field
Fill Creator C into the creator field
Select Restricted as the access level
Fill a valid terms of use text into the terms field
Finalize the ingest workflow
Verify the newly ingested restricted material is visible in the admin materials list

title: Unpublish an announcement (toggle inactive)
description: Verifies an admin can change an existing announcement from active to inactive and the list reflects the updated state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to announcement management
Start creating a new announcement
Fill Test Announcement Toggle Beta into the announcement title field
Fill Toggle state test content into the announcement content field
Set the announcement to active/published
Save the announcement
Toggle the announcement state to inactive/unpublished for Test Announcement Toggle Beta
Save the announcement
Verify the announcements list shows Test Announcement Toggle Beta as inactive

title: Create a new category
description: Creating a category adds it to the categories list for organization and filtering.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open category management
Start creating a new category
Fill Category QA Alpha into the category name field
Fill Category created by automated UI test into the category description field
Save the category
Verify the new category appears in the categories list

title: Open public material detail via external link from admin materials
description: This test verifies an admin can use the external link from an admin material row to reach the public material detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the admin materials management area
Initiate a new material ingest
Select a department/subfonds from the hierarchy selector
Select a series from the series selector
Fill Admin External Link Seed 001 into the material title field
Fill Creator ExternalLink into the creator field
Select Public as the access level
Fill a valid terms of use text into the terms field
Finalize the ingest workflow
Fill Admin External Link Seed 001 into the search field
Use the external link control for the seeded material
Verify the material detail view is displayed

title: Filter admin materials by hierarchy tree selection
description: This test verifies selecting a node in the hierarchy tree filters the admin materials list accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the admin materials management area
Initiate a new material ingest
Select a department/subfonds from the hierarchy selector
Select a series from the series selector
Fill Admin Hierarchy Seed 001 into the material title field
Fill Creator HierarchySeed into the creator field
Select Public as the access level
Fill a valid terms of use text into the terms field
Finalize the ingest workflow
Select the same department or series node in the hierarchy tree browser
Verify the materials list is filtered and contains the seeded material

title: Review dashboard overview components for admin governance
description: An admin can view key dashboard components including charts, stat cards, and the activity feed for governance oversight.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Scroll through the admin dashboard overview
Verify the ingestion velocity chart and stat cards are displayed
Verify the activity feed is displayed

title: Ingestion preview step supports navigating across previewed pages
description: This test verifies that during ingestion the user can navigate among generated preview pages and the preview content updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the admin materials management area
Initiate a new material ingest
Select a department/subfonds from the hierarchy selector
Select a series from the series selector
Fill Ingest Preview Navigation 001 into the material title field
Fill Creator B into the creator field
Wait for preview thumbnails to be displayed
Select a thumbnail for a different page in the preview
Verify the main preview updates to the selected page

title: Edit an existing category
description: Editing a category updates its details and the updated category remains available in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open category management
Start creating a new category
Fill Category QA To Edit into the category name field
Fill Category seed for edit test into the category description field
Save the category
Start editing the newly created category
Fill Category QA Edited into the category name field
Save the changes
Verify the category appears in the list with the updated name Category QA Edited

title: Ingestion metadata checklist completion is required to finalize
description: This test verifies the ingest workflow enforces completing the metadata checklist before allowing finalization.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the admin materials management area
Initiate a new material ingest
Select a department/subfonds from the hierarchy selector
Select a series from the series selector
Fill Ingest Checklist Gate 001 into the material title field
Fill Creator D into the creator field
Navigate to the metadata checklist step
Attempt to finalize without completing required checklist items
Verify checklist validation feedback is visible and finalization is blocked

title: Persist announcement list after page refresh
description: Verifies announcements remain available after reloading the announcement management page within the same browser session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to announcement management
Start creating a new announcement
Fill Test Announcement Persist Delta into the announcement title field
Fill Persistence test content into the announcement content field
Save the announcement
Refresh the page
Verify the announcements list still contains Test Announcement Persist Delta

title: Ingestion requires required setup fields before advancing/finalizing
description: This test verifies the ingestion workflow blocks progressing or finalizing when required setup fields are missing and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the admin materials management area
Initiate a new material ingest
Attempt to continue or finalize without selecting hierarchy and without entering title/creator
Verify required-field validation errors are visible and the workflow does not proceed

title: Auto-transition from splash to main home content on first visit
description: Verifies the splash screen appears on first visit and automatically transitions to the home page content after the progress completes.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the splash progress to complete
Verify the main home content is displayed and the splash screen is no longer visible

title: Delete an existing category
description: Deleting a category removes it from the categories list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open category management
Start creating a new category
Fill Category QA To Delete into the category name field
Fill Category seed for delete test into the category description field
Save the category
Delete the newly created category
Confirm the deletion
Verify the deleted category no longer appears in the categories list

title: Validate required fields when creating an announcement
description: Verifies the announcement form prevents saving when required fields are missing and shows an in-form validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to announcement management
Start creating a new announcement
Leave the announcement title and content fields empty
Attempt to save the announcement
Verify a validation error is visible and the announcement is not created in the list

title: Clear all filters restores unfiltered collections listing
description: Verifies that clearing all filters returns the collections page to an unfiltered state showing the full listing.

steps.description: Navigate to /collections
Fill a search query into the search field
Open the filters panel
Select an access level filter option
Clear all filters
Verify the collections listing is restored to an unfiltered state

title: Registration requires mandatory fields
description: Verifies that attempting to register with missing required fields shows validation errors and does not submit.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Test Researcher into the name field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Select an institution
Select a role or user category
Submit the registration form
Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: See required-field validation when submitting an empty access request form
description: A researcher who submits the request access form without required information sees validation errors and the request is not submitted.

steps.description: Navigate to /request-access
Submit the access request
Verify required field validation errors are visible

title: Cancel out of announcement creation without saving
description: Verifies an admin can abandon creation/editing and no new announcement is added to the list without saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to announcement management
Start creating a new announcement
Fill Test Announcement Unsaved Epsilon into the announcement title field
Fill Unsaved draft content into the announcement content field
Navigate away to the admin dashboard using the app navigation
Click the navigation link to announcement management
Verify Test Announcement Unsaved Epsilon is not present in the announcements list

title: Do not show splash screen again within the same session
description: Verifies returning to the home route in the same browser session does not show the splash screen again and loads main content immediately.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the splash progress to complete
Navigate to /about
Navigate to /
Verify the main home content is displayed without showing the splash screen

title: Invalid login shows an error without signing in
description: Verifies that submitting incorrect credentials shows an error and the user is not logged in.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill invalid-user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible
Verify the user is not on an authenticated dashboard

title: Collections filters can narrow results to an empty state and recover by clearing
description: Verifies that applying restrictive filters can produce an empty results state and clearing filters restores results.

steps.description: Navigate to /collections
Fill a highly specific search query into the search field
Open the filters panel
Select an access level filter option
Select a category filter option
Toggle OAIS-only filtering on
Verify an empty results state is displayed
Clear all filters
Verify at least one material is displayed in the listing
